en: This is a lively and colorful cartoon scene set on a snowy hill. Many people and animals are enjoying winter activities, but with some funny twists. On the left side, a person is roasting marshmallows, and nearby, a child rides a sled shaped like a donut. Behind them, a person in a swimsuit is sitting in a giant teacup sliding down the snow. A rhinoceros watches from an icy cave. In the center, a man in a bathtub is happily sliding down the hill. Next to him. a boy snowboards, while a child on a sled passes by a "STOP" sign. On the right side, a girl pulls another ona sled, and a dog happily runs ahead. A penguis is skating on the snowm and nearby, a woman in a bluw coar satns under a rain cloud. In the background, a man is walking among cactuses, and a rainbow appears from the hill. A smiling snowman sits on the groung while another child builds it. At the bottom, a bear in a sweater stands by, while a couple drinks hot chocolatem laughing together.
de: Ein Golden Retriever sitzt auf einem grünen Rasen...
